product: Genie user experience and evaluation improvements
tagline: Feedback labels remain visible across conversation redirections: Feedback labels added to earlier messages now remain visible after users ask follow up questions.
what_it_does: Feedback labels remain visible across conversation redirections: Feedback labels added to earlier messages now remain visible after users ask follow up questions. Editable parameters supported for date and numeric fields: Genie now allows editable parameters on date and numeric fields, expanding beyond previous support for string fields. Revamped response explanations: Response explanations are now more concise and easier to read.
why_it_matters: Improved result classification for benchmark evaluations: The evaluation function more accurately classifies results as Good or Bad, especially when Genie returns empty results or omits data found in the example SQL output.
key_takeaway: Feedback labels remain visible across conversation redirections: Feedback labels added to earlier messages now remain visible after users ask follow up questions.
